"""FastAPI application setup."""

from __future__ import annotations

from contextlib import asynccontextmanager
from pathlib import Path

from fastapi import FastAPI
from fastapi.staticfiles import StaticFiles
from jinja2 import Environment, FileSystemLoader

from review_tool import db
from review_tool.config import DB_PATH
from review_tool.routes.api import router as api_router
from review_tool.routes.pages import router as pages_router

TEMPLATE_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "templates"
STATIC_DIR = Path(__file__).parent / "static"


@asynccontextmanager
async def lifespan(app: FastAPI):
    """Initialise the database on startup."""
    await db.init_db(DB_PATH)
    yield


def create_app() -> FastAPI:
    """Create and configure the FastAPI application."""
    app = FastAPI(title="Charm Bug Review Tool", lifespan=lifespan)

    # Templates
    env = Environment(loader=FileSystemLoader(str(TEMPLATE_DIR)), autoescape=True)
    app.state.templates = _TemplateAdapter(env)

    # Static files
    if STATIC_DIR.exists():
        app.mount("/static", StaticFiles(directory=str(STATIC_DIR)), name="static")

    # Routes
    app.include_router(pages_router)
    app.include_router(api_router)

    return app


class _TemplateAdapter:
    """Adapt Jinja2 Environment to work like Starlette's Jinja2Templates."""

    def __init__(self, env: Environment):
        self.env = env

    def TemplateResponse(self, name: str, context: dict, status_code: int = 200):
        from starlette.responses import HTMLResponse

        template = self.env.get_template(name)
        html = template.render(**context)
        return HTMLResponse(html, status_code=status_code)

content.text:
Wait — using both `hx-patch` and `hx-get` on the same element won't work cleanly. A better approach: have the PATCH return the full detail panel (with updated toggle state), and separately update the row. Let me rethink this.

The simplest approach: after the PATCH completes, re-fetch the detail to get fresh button states. I'll use an `hx-on` event to trigger the refresh.

input.old_string:
<button id="btn-reviewed"
                    hx-patch="/findings/{{ finding.id }}"
                    hx-vals='{"review_status": "{{ 'pending' if finding.review_status == 'reviewed' else 'reviewed' }}"}'
                    hx-target="#detail-panel"
                    hx-swap="innerHTML"
                    hx-get="/findings/{{ finding.id }}"
                    class="{{ 'contrast' if finding.review_status == 'reviewed' else 'outline' }}">
                ✓ Reviewed <kbd>R</kbd>
            </button>
            <button id="btn-false-positive"
                    hx-patch="/findings/{{ finding.id }}"
                    hx-vals='{"review_status": "{{ 'pending' if finding.review_status == 'false_positive' else 'false_positive' }}"}'
                    hx-target="#detail-panel"
                    hx-swap="innerHTML"
                    hx-get="/findings/{{ finding.id }}"
                    class="{{ 'contrast' if finding.review_status == 'false_positive' else 'outline secondary' }}">
                ✗ False Positive <kbd>F</kbd>
            </button>
input.new_string:
<button id="btn-reviewed"
                    hx-patch="/findings/{{ finding.id }}"
                    hx-vals='{"review_status": "{{ 'pending' if finding.review_status == 'reviewed' else 'reviewed' }}"}'
                    hx-target="#finding-row-{{ finding.id }}"
                    hx-swap="outerHTML"
                    hx-on::after-request="htmx.ajax('GET', '/findings/{{ finding.id }}', '#detail-panel')"
                    class="{{ 'contrast' if finding.review_status == 'reviewed' else 'outline' }}">
                ✓ Reviewed <kbd>R</kbd>
            </button>
            <button id="btn-false-positive"
                    hx-patch="/findings/{{ finding.id }}"
                    hx-vals='{"review_status": "{{ 'pending' if finding.review_status == 'false_positive' else 'false_positive' }}"}'
                    hx-target="#finding-row-{{ finding.id }}"
                    hx-swap="outerHTML"
                    hx-on::after-request="htmx.ajax('GET', '/findings/{{ finding.id }}', '#detail-panel')"
                    class="{{ 'contrast' if finding.review_status == 'false_positive' else 'outline secondary' }}">
                ✗ False Positive <kbd>F</kbd>
            </button>
